# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: ci-cd-fast

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main"]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ci-cd-fast-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write

env:
  NODE_ENV: production

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    outputs:
      image: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.image }}
      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Docker meta
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          IMAGE="ghcr.io/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY,,}/app"
          TAG="${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          echo "image=$IMAGE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Login to GHCR
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Build & push image (fast)
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: .
          file: ./Dockerfile
          push: true
          tags: |
            ${{ steps.meta.outputs.image }}:${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
            ${{ steps.meta.outputs.image }}:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          build-args: |
            CI=true

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Deploy via SSH (fast)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.2.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          port: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PORT || 22 }}
          script: |
            set -euo pipefail
            IMAGE="${{ needs.build.outputs.image }}"
            TAG="${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}"

            echo "${{ secrets.GHCR_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" | docker login ghcr.io -u "${{ secrets.GHCR_USER || github.actor }}" --password-stdin

            docker pull "$IMAGE:$TAG"

            docker rm -f app || true
            docker run -d --restart unless-stopped --name app \
              -p 80:8080 \
              "$IMAGE:$TAG"

            docker image prune -f || true
